cases.name: accepts minimal standard config
cases.yaml:
version: 2
hack: false
limits:
  timeMs: 1000
  memoryMb: 256
checker:
  type: builtin
  name: exact
aggregation:
  testcases: sum_max_max
subtasks:
  - testcases:
      - input: sample/1.in
        answer: sample/1.ans

cases.name: rejects unsupported version
cases.yaml:
version: 1
hack: false
limits:
  timeMs: 1000
  memoryMb: 256
checker:
  type: builtin
  name: exact
aggregation:
  testcases: sum_max_max
subtasks:
  - testcases:
      - input: sample/1.in
        answer: sample/1.ans

cases.name: accepts enabled hack with answer generator
cases.yaml:
version: 2
hack: true
validator:
  path: validators/validator.cpp
standard:
  language: cpp17
  path: solutions/std.cpp
limits:
  timeMs: 1000
  memoryMb: 256
checker:
  type: builtin
  name: exact
aggregation:
  testcases: sum_max_max
subtasks:
  - testcases:
      - input: sample/1.in
        answer: sample/1.ans

cases.name: rejects enabled hack without standard declaration
cases.yaml:
version: 2
hack: true
validator:
  path: validators/validator.cpp
limits:
  timeMs: 1000
  memoryMb: 256
checker:
  type: builtin
  name: exact
aggregation:
  testcases: sum_max_max
subtasks:
  - testcases:
      - input: sample/1.in
        answer: sample/1.ans

cases.name: accepts role stubs and headers
cases.yaml:
version: 2
hack: false
roles:
  main:
    stubs:
      cpp17: stubs/main.cpp
headers:
  - headers/xxx.h
limits:
  timeMs: 1000
  memoryMb: 256
checker:
  type: builtin
  name: exact
aggregation:
  testcases: sum_max_max
subtasks:
  - testcases:
      - input: sample/1.in
        answer: sample/1.ans

cases.name: rejects duplicate header include names
cases.yaml:
version: 2
hack: false
headers:
  - headers/xxx.h
  - headers/other/xxx.h
limits:
  timeMs: 1000
  memoryMb: 256
checker:
  type: builtin
  name: exact
aggregation:
  testcases: sum_max_max
subtasks:
  - testcases:
      - input: sample/1.in
        answer: sample/1.ans

cases.name: rejects old comma aggregation
cases.yaml:
version: 2
hack: false
limits:
  timeMs: 1000
  memoryMb: 256
checker:
  type: builtin
  name: exact
aggregation:
  testcases: sum,max,max
subtasks:
  - testcases:
      - input: sample/1.in
        answer: sample/1.ans

cases.name: accepts sample main and answerless hack testcase types
cases.yaml:
version: 2
hack: false
limits:
  timeMs: 1000
  memoryMb: 256
checker:
  type: builtin
  name: exact
aggregation:
  testcases: sum_max_max
subtasks:
  - testcases:
      - type: sample
        input: sample/1.in
        answer: sample/1.ans
      - type: hack
        input: hacks/7.in
      - type: main
        input: sample/1.in
        answer: sample/1.ans

cases.name: rejects score ratio on sample testcase
cases.yaml:
version: 2
hack: false
limits:
  timeMs: 1000
  memoryMb: 256
checker:
  type: builtin
  name: exact
aggregation:
  testcases: sum_max_max
subtasks:
  - testcases:
      - type: sample
        scoreRatio: 0
        input: sample/1.in
        answer: sample/1.ans
      - input: sample/1.in
        answer: sample/1.ans

cases.name: rejects missing input file
cases.yaml:
version: 2
hack: false
limits:
  timeMs: 1000
  memoryMb: 256
checker:
  type: builtin
  name: exact
aggregation:
  testcases: sum_max_max
subtasks:
  - testcases:
      - input: missing/1.in
        answer: sample/1.ans
